remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target creature gains flying until end of turn.

params.SpellDescription: Detain target nonland permanent an opponent controls. (Until your next turn, that permanent can't attack or block and its activated abilities can't be activated.)

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Detain target nonland permanent an opponent controls. (Until your next turn, that permanent can't attack or block and its activated abilities can't be activated.)
